claims_boundary.detector_contract: Hamamatsu ORCA-Fusion C14440-20UP, M=10, catalogue-typical QE and fast-scan read-noise inputs
claims_boundary.forbidden_interpretation: a clean reconstruction image alone is not evidence that every displayed feature is measured

label: reconstruction_credibility_v2_orca_fusion_m10
purpose: quantify data support, conditional detector-noise uncertainty, residual structure, prior sensitivity and blank false positives for the frozen ORCA-Fusion reconstruction contract without using truth error as the credibility measure

bootstrap_assumptions: parametric resampling from the fitted camera prediction
declared independent Poisson and Gaussian read noise
fixed forward operator, basis, support and regulariser
does not include calibration or instrument-model uncertainty
dark_field.development_blank_boundary: Synthetic blank ranks are a development diagnostic only; they do not define an experimental threshold or p value.
local_assumptions: local linearisation at the fitted solution
declared forward operator and curvature regulariser
does not include instrument mismatch or morphology-model uncertainty

declared independent Poisson and Gaussian read noise
fixed forward operator, basis, support and regulariser
does not include calibration or instrument-model uncertainty
dual_port.development_blank_boundary: Synthetic blank ranks are a development diagnostic only; they do not define an experimental threshold or p value.
